title: Dimensions in Time (Doctor Who)
description: A brand new Doctor Who mod that adds Tardises, sonic screwdrivers, monsters, new dimensions and more !
body:
# **Dimensions in Time**

## A brand new Doctor Who mod for modern Minecraft
This mod is base on the BBC TV show "Doctor Who". It adds Tardises, sonic screwdrivers, monsters, a new dimension and more.

## Features
### Sonic Screwdrivers
This mod adds sonic screwdrivers with the following functionalities:
- Activate redstone inputs, lamps and TnT
- Scan mobs for basic information
- Locate nearby ores
- Locate Artron Rifts

### Monsters
This mod adds a few iconic monsters from the show:
- Weeping Angels which spawn in the Overworld
- Daleks which can be found in their spaceships
- Cybermen which spawn on the Moon and can be found in Moon bases

## The Tardis

Tardis Corals can be found in the end inside a mysterious structure.
![A smooth stone box covered in vines](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4f5197d1de875f2e7aa430901d5aa2d0b193707_0.webp)

This coral can be grown on a tardis grower, powered by Artron Energy Bottles.
These can be collected by using glass bottles on Artron Energy Rifts that appear on the Overworld surface (and are more easily found using a sonic screwdriver).

The coral grower also allows you to choose the interior of your Tardis (from the 5 modern interiors for now).

The Tardis allows you to travel anywhere in the vanilla dimensions and on the Moon.
